'''√t-w-m''' ('''tawama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cub|cub]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cub|cub]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-w-m
|-
! Lemma
| tawama
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tawamithi || tawamiji || tawamishi || tawami
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tawamuthuth || tawamujuj || tawamushush || tawam
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tawamuthu || tawamuju || tawamushu || tawamu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tawamufuth || tawamufuj || tawamufush || tawamuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || tawamethe || tawameje || tawameshe || tawame
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tawamothoth || tawamojoj || tawamoshosh || tawam
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tawamotho || tawamojo || tawamosho || tawamo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tawamofoth || tawamofoj || tawamofosh || tawamof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tawamïfïf || tawamïfïf || tawamïfïf || tawamïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf || tawamïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tawamæthæ || tawamæjæ || tawamæshæ || tawamæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tawamathath || tawamajaj || tawamashash || tawam
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tawamatha || tawamaja || tawamasha || tawama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tawamafath || tawamafaj || tawamafash || tawamaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || tawamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gotawamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokitawamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || tawamnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gotawamnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokitawamnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || tawamshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gotawamnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokitawamshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || tawamroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gotawamnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokitawamroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || tawammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gotawamnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokitawammuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || tawamsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gotawamnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokitawamsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || tawamngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gotawamnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokitawamngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || tawamyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gotawamnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokitawamyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || tawamyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gotawamnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokitawamyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || tawamnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gotawamnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokitawamnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || tawamnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gotawamnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitawamnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || tawamnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gotawamnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokitawamnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || tawamshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gotawamnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokitawamshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || tawamshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gotawamnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitawamshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || tawamshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gotawamnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokitawamshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || tawamronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gotawamnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokitawamronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || tawamroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gotawamnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokitawamroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || tawamromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gotawamnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokitawamromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || tawammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gotawamnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokitawammunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || tawammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gotawamnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokitawammushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || tawammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gotawamnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokitawammuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || tawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || tæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hotawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hotæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohotawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohotæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nütawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nütæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünütawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünütæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïtawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïtæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïtæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lutawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lutæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulutawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulutæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || litawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || litæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilitawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilitæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kotawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kotæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokotawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokotæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || ketawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || ketæwæm
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || keketawam
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || keketæwæm
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
